Joonho
k-Nearest Neighborhood Algorithm Practice Projects Blog About

07. Pandas Module (DataFrame, Add/Delete Data)

13 December 2020 - 7 mins read time
Tags: Fast Campus Pandas

Source: Fast Campus

import pandas as pd

# data source: https://www.kaggle.com/hesh97/titanicdataset-traincsv/data
train_data = pd.read_csv('./train.csv')
train_data.head()
PassengerId Survived Pclass Name Sex Age SibSp Parch Ticket Fare Cabin Embarked
0 1 0 3 Braund, Mr. Owen Harris male 22.0 1 0 A/5 21171 7.2500 NaN S
1 2 1 1 Cumings, Mrs. John Bradley (Florence Briggs Th... female 38.0 1 0 PC 17599 71.2833 C85 C
2 3 1 3 Heikkinen, Miss. Laina female 26.0 0 0 STON/O2. 3101282 7.9250 NaN S
3 4 1 1 Futrelle, Mrs. Jacques Heath (Lily May Peel) female 35.0 1 0 113803 53.1000 C123 S
4 5 0 3 Allen, Mr. William Henry male 35.0 0 0 373450 8.0500 NaN S

1. Add new column

  • Using [ ]
  • Using insert

Using [ ]

train_data['age_double'] = train_data['Age'] * 2
train_data[['age_double', 'Age']]
age_double Age
0 44.0 22.0
1 76.0 38.0
2 52.0 26.0
3 70.0 35.0
4 70.0 35.0
... ... ...
886 54.0 27.0
887 38.0 19.0
888 NaN NaN
889 52.0 26.0
890 64.0 32.0

891 rows × 2 columns

train_data['age_triple'] = train_data['age_double'] + train_data['Age']
train_data.head()
PassengerId Survived Pclass Name Sex Age SibSp Parch Ticket Fare Cabin Embarked age_double age_triple
0 1 0 3 Braund, Mr. Owen Harris male 22.0 1 0 A/5 21171 7.2500 NaN S 44.0 66.0
1 2 1 1 Cumings, Mrs. John Bradley (Florence Briggs Th... female 38.0 1 0 PC 17599 71.2833 C85 C 76.0 114.0
2 3 1 3 Heikkinen, Miss. Laina female 26.0 0 0 STON/O2. 3101282 7.9250 NaN S 52.0 78.0
3 4 1 1 Futrelle, Mrs. Jacques Heath (Lily May Peel) female 35.0 1 0 113803 53.1000 C123 S 70.0 105.0
4 5 0 3 Allen, Mr. William Henry male 35.0 0 0 373450 8.0500 NaN S 70.0 105.0

Using insert

train_data.insert(3, 'fair10', train_data['Fare']/10)
train_data.head()
PassengerId Survived Pclass fair10 Name Sex Age SibSp Parch Ticket Fare Cabin Embarked age_double age_triple
0 1 0 3 0.72500 Braund, Mr. Owen Harris male 22.0 1 0 A/5 21171 7.2500 NaN S 44.0 66.0
1 2 1 1 7.12833 Cumings, Mrs. John Bradley (Florence Briggs Th... female 38.0 1 0 PC 17599 71.2833 C85 C 76.0 114.0
2 3 1 3 0.79250 Heikkinen, Miss. Laina female 26.0 0 0 STON/O2. 3101282 7.9250 NaN S 52.0 78.0
3 4 1 1 5.31000 Futrelle, Mrs. Jacques Heath (Lily May Peel) female 35.0 1 0 113803 53.1000 C123 S 70.0 105.0
4 5 0 3 0.80500 Allen, Mr. William Henry male 35.0 0 0 373450 8.0500 NaN S 70.0 105.0

2. Delete Column

  • Using drop
    • Delete multiple using list
train_data.drop('age_triple', axis=1) # return copy and delete. original data still has
train_data.head()
PassengerId Survived Pclass fair10 Name Sex Age SibSp Parch Ticket Fare Cabin Embarked age_double age_triple
0 1 0 3 0.72500 Braund, Mr. Owen Harris male 22.0 1 0 A/5 21171 7.2500 NaN S 44.0 66.0
1 2 1 1 7.12833 Cumings, Mrs. John Bradley (Florence Briggs Th... female 38.0 1 0 PC 17599 71.2833 C85 C 76.0 114.0
2 3 1 3 0.79250 Heikkinen, Miss. Laina female 26.0 0 0 STON/O2. 3101282 7.9250 NaN S 52.0 78.0
3 4 1 1 5.31000 Futrelle, Mrs. Jacques Heath (Lily May Peel) female 35.0 1 0 113803 53.1000 C123 S 70.0 105.0
4 5 0 3 0.80500 Allen, Mr. William Henry male 35.0 0 0 373450 8.0500 NaN S 70.0 105.0 
train_data.drop('age_triple', axis=1, inplace=True) # delete original data
train_data.head()
PassengerId Survived Pclass fair10 Name Sex Age SibSp Parch Ticket Fare Cabin Embarked age_double
0 1 0 3 0.72500 Braund, Mr. Owen Harris male 22.0 1 0 A/5 21171 7.2500 NaN S 44.0
1 2 1 1 7.12833 Cumings, Mrs. John Bradley (Florence Briggs Th... female 38.0 1 0 PC 17599 71.2833 C85 C 76.0
2 3 1 3 0.79250 Heikkinen, Miss. Laina female 26.0 0 0 STON/O2. 3101282 7.9250 NaN S 52.0
3 4 1 1 5.31000 Futrelle, Mrs. Jacques Heath (Lily May Peel) female 35.0 1 0 113803 53.1000 C123 S 70.0
4 5 0 3 0.80500 Allen, Mr. William Henry male 35.0 0 0 373450 8.0500 NaN S 70.0 
train_data.drop(['fair10', 'age_double'], axis = 1)
PassengerId Survived Pclass Name Sex Age SibSp Parch Ticket Fare Cabin Embarked
0 1 0 3 Braund, Mr. Owen Harris male 22.0 1 0 A/5 21171 7.2500 NaN S
1 2 1 1 Cumings, Mrs. John Bradley (Florence Briggs Th... female 38.0 1 0 PC 17599 71.2833 C85 C
2 3 1 3 Heikkinen, Miss. Laina female 26.0 0 0 STON/O2. 3101282 7.9250 NaN S
3 4 1 1 Futrelle, Mrs. Jacques Heath (Lily May Peel) female 35.0 1 0 113803 53.1000 C123 S
4 5 0 3 Allen, Mr. William Henry male 35.0 0 0 373450 8.0500 NaN S
... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ... ...
886 887 0 2 Montvila, Rev. Juozas male 27.0 0 0 211536 13.0000 NaN S
887 888 1 1 Graham, Miss. Margaret Edith female 19.0 0 0 112053 30.0000 B42 S
888 889 0 3 Johnston, Miss. Catherine Helen "Carrie" female NaN 1 2 W./C. 6607 23.4500 NaN S
889 890 1 1 Behr, Mr. Karl Howell male 26.0 0 0 111369 30.0000 C148 C
890 891 0 3 Dooley, Mr. Patrick male 32.0 0 0 370376 7.7500 NaN Q

891 rows × 12 columns
